mapper.insert:
insert into his_mirror_consume_link ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, mirror_row_id, fetch_batch_id, dept_batch_consume_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, alloc_qty, dep_inventory_id, gz_dep_inventory_id, stk_dep_end_date, in_hospital_code, returned_qty, refundable_remaining_qty, create_time, del_flag ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.mirrorRowId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.allocQty}, #{e.depInventoryId}, #{e.gzDepInventoryId}, #{e.stkDepEndDate}, #{e.inHospitalCode}, ifnull(#{e.returnedQty}, 0), #{e.refundableRemainingQty}, #{e.createTime}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0))
mapper.select: select distinct ifnull(h.bill_source, '') from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0

select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.create_time as createTime, h.id as consumeBillId, h.consume_bill_no as consumeBillNo, h.consume_bill_date as consumeBillDate, h.consume_bill_status as consumeBillStatus, e.id as consumeEntryId, e.material_name as materialName, e.batch_no as batchNo, e.batch_number as batchNumber, e.qty as entryQty, case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(e.main_barcode) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end as inHospitalCode from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(e.del_flag, 0) = 0 where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 order by l.create_time desc, l.id desc

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, gz_dep_inventory_id as gzDepInventoryId, stk_dep_end_date as stkDepEndDate, in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty, create_time as createTime from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = #{visitKind} and mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and coalesce(refundable_remaining_qty, alloc_qty - ifnull(returned_qty, 0)) > 0
and dep_inventory_id is not null
and gz_dep_inventory_id is not null
mapper.update: update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}, refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - (ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
